title: Chewy Vegan Cheese Middle Eastern Citrus Peel Crumble
description: This citrusy, chewy vegan cheese crumble features a blend of parmesan alternatives and is perfect for breakfast or a romantic dinner accompaniment.

ingredients.name: Citrus Zest (from 2 oranges)
ingredients.notes: Grated zest of the citrus fruits

instructions: Preheat your oven to 350°F (175°C). Grease a small baking dish with olive oil.
Mix the Vegan Parmesan Alternative, olive oil, grated citrus zest, and freshly ground black pepper in the prepared baking dish. Stir until all ingredients are evenly distributed and moistened.
Add water little by little to achieve desired consistency (should be slightly thicker than pancake batter). Mix thoroughly, ensuring no lumps remain.
Pour the mixture into a greased pan or shallow dish. Bake for about 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown on top and edges start pulling away from sides of the pan.
Remove from oven and allow to cool slightly before serving as a crumble topping over your favorite plant-based main course.
